claims.description: T0 proof that the governed transport demo bundle is registered, documented, and fail-closed where specified before live Tigrcorn execution is claimed.

claims.description: The governed Tigrcorn transport demo bundle passes the positive end-to-end matrix and the selected negative HTTP and mTLS robustness probes.

claims.description: T0 proof that websocket acceptance order and hot-plan route identity are correct before live Tigrcorn websocket behavior is claimed.

claims.description: Tigrcorn websocket transport closure now covers handshake ordering, route identity, protocol-native JSON-RPC error behavior, and explicit WSS NDJSON fail-closed behavior.
claims.title: Tigrcorn websocket e2e closure T2

claims.description: T0 proof that the WebTransport demo emits native accept, stream, datagram, and close events on the correct session lane before live Tigrcorn execution is claimed.

claims.description: T1 proof that the single-session WebTransport demo passes a live Tigrcorn server-client session over the governed demo surface.
claims.title: WebTransport single-session demo proof T1

claims.description: The narrow WebTransport demo rail now preserves native event ordering, rejects invalid inbound lanes, and keeps session-close behavior idempotent while remaining live-proven on Tigrcorn.
claims.title: WebTransport single-session demo proof T2

claims.description: WebTransport Tigrcorn session multiplexing T2 is backed by concrete executable proof for this tranche.
claims.title: WebTransport Tigrcorn session multiplexing T2

claims.description: Planned conformance claim for WS and WSS JSON-RPC canonical coverage.

claims.description: WebSocket and WSS JSON-RPC subprotocol parity, NDJSON fail-closed behavior, and framing/subprotocol validation are covered by runtime and negative corpus tests.

claims.description: WS/WSS JSON-RPC transport coverage now includes live Tigrcorn negative misuse behavior and protocol-native error semantics in addition to the positive rail and route-identity contract.

claims.description: Planned conformance claim for WS and WSS NDJSON framing and path coverage.
claims.title: WS and WSS NDJSON framing and path coverage claim

claims.description: Tigrbl statically exposes governed WebTransport native lanes, rejects native WT message lanes, preserves WebSocket framing gates, and aligns runtime families to the tigr-asgi-contract family set.
claims.title: Transport lane and framing runtime T0 proof

claims.description: Tigrbl compiles WebTransport native lane BindingSpecs into lane-specific KernelPlan rows, gates stream/datagram inner framing at runtime, rejects native WT message lanes, and preserves WebSocket JSON-RPC/NDJSON framing gates.
claims.title: Transport lane and framing runtime T1 proof

claims.description: Tigrbl rejects unsupported WebTransport native message lanes, rejects WT stream/datagram framing boundary violations, preserves WebSocket NDJSON fail-closed behavior, and keeps lower-tier transport lane/framing proofs in lineage.
claims.title: Transport lane and framing runtime T2 proof

claims.description: WS/WSS NDJSON remains explicitly fail-closed, and the governed demo bundle now proves that state through an executable repo test instead of a placeholder row.
claims.title: Transport ws/wss ndjson T2 fail-closed proof

features.description: Owns the governed examples/transport_demo bundle and its Tigrcorn server-client proof requirement.
features.title: Tigrcorn transport demo proof bundle

features.description: Owns closure for ws, wss, and wss plus jsonrpc on the live Tigrcorn rail; canonical lowering and bridge proof are necessary but insufficient.
features.title: Tigrcorn websocket end-to-end closure

features.description: The canonical transport matrix enumerates supported, partial, and planned/fail-closed scenarios, and support labels track the required proof class rather than metadata alone.
features.title: Complete AppSpec transport scenario matrix

features.description: WS+JSON-RPC and WSS+JSON-RPC remain symmetric canonical binding scenarios, but live Tigrcorn server-client closure is separate and still required before supported status is claimed.
features.title: WS and WSS JSON-RPC canonical coverage

features.description: Tracks WS and WSS NDJSON framing as explicit fail-closed negative-proof coverage only; no positive runtime support is claimed until explicit codec and e2e closure exist.
features.title: WS and WSS NDJSON framing and path coverage

features.description: Owns the narrower Tigrcorn demo proof for one WebTransport session with one bidi stream, one unidirectional stream, and datagram traffic.
features.title: WebTransport single-session demo proof

features.description: Prove that mixed WebTransport stream and datagram events through Tigrcorn preserve lane identity, lane-local framing, and close semantics when interleaved under one Tigrbl session.
features.title: WebTransport Tigrcorn mixed lane ordering

features.description: Tracks the broad bridge-contract proof for Tigrcorn-backed WebTransport session multiplexing; this is distinct from the narrower transport demo single-session proof surface.
features.title: WebTransport Tigrcorn session multiplexing

features.body:
This feature tracks symmetric WS and WSS JSON-RPC binding declarations, including explicit `framing=jsonrpc` semantics and JSON-RPC-compatible websocket subprotocol handling.

It is intentionally scoped to binding parity and validation on the active line. Frozen current-target certification remains a separate support-level question governed by the support matrix and release boundary documents.
features.description: Tracks canonical WS and WSS JSON-RPC binding parity and subprotocol validation, while live websocket route identity and Tigrcorn JSON-RPC end-to-end closure remain separate proof obligations.
features.title: WS and WSS JSON-RPC subprotocol parity

WebTransport native lane runtime negative corpus T2

tests.body: Bridge-contract proof only. This row exercises canonical WebTransport scope and event behavior through Tigrcorn-style contract events and does not by itself close live Tigrcorn server-client multiplexing support claims.
tests.title: WebTransport Tigrcorn bridge integration
WebTransport Tigrcorn message lane rejection integration
WebTransport Tigrcorn mixed lane framing integration
WebTransport Tigrcorn session close cascade integration
WsBindingSpec framing and subprotocol validation contract
